intake.user_request: Four-part quality depth pass: (1) fix orchestrator.ts:477 rawExports/exports mismatch causing false staleness positives, (2) push semantic header coverage toward 100% via populate-coderef --source-headers, (3) audit RAG query hit quality, (4) validate self-improving loop end-to-end

classification.plan_type_rationale: Four ordered work items with a hard dependency chain (bug fix before header fill, header fill before RAG audit, RAG audit before loop validation). Medium scope touching orchestrator.ts, header pipeline, and RAG query path. No architectural overhaul.

in_scope: src/pipeline/orchestrator.ts:477 — rawExports vs exports mismatch in staleness check
out_of_scope: Breaking API changes to public CLI surface

constraints: Test suite must remain green (1495 passing) at all times
Fix rawExports bug BEFORE stamping headers — otherwise stale headers get re-stamped with wrong exports
RAG server must be running for phases 3-4
No blind widening of staleness check — understand both extraction paths first
